name: Boarding School || St. Michael’s Juvenile Rehabilitation Academy
description:
St. Michael’s is a boarding school in the Yorkshire Dales for young offenders. It is often attended by international students from rich families, and almost all the British people that attend are also rich.

How you got there is up to you.
